rawAssistant: Traveling to the marsh, eh? I've got just what you need. My special 'Marsh-Mist' kit might do the trick - it's a mix of salves and potions that can help counteract some of those nasty poisons. And if you're feeling brave, I've also got a few scraps of stitched fabric that might offer some protection against... unpleasantness.
